features: PREMIUM MATERIAL: This flexible tub constructed from top-quality polythylene material, it promises both durability and longevity. They are made from 100% recyclable material.

VERSATILE & STURDY: These garden tubs are versatile, light-weight, and sturdy yet flexible and two comfort grip handles making them the convenient container for your carrying needs. The handles are allow for easy lifting and carrying.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: This plastic flexi tubs with a capacity of 42L, are great for use in the Home, garden, washing, stables, or building sites.

DURABLE: These flexi tubs are designed for reliability and heavy duty tasks, with super strong reinforced handles that allow for easy lifting and carrying. The tubs are also cold resistant, so you can confidently use it any time of the year for convenient DIY when you need it.

SPACE-SAVING DESIGN: These stackable large tub plastic design champions tidiness in your living space. They are great for all sorts of jobs around the garden and home. An essential storage bucket that doubles as a plastering bucket, ensuring you save space while staying organized

Designed for reliability for heavy duty tasks, with super strong reinforced handles that allow for easy lifting and carrying. Ideal for use in your home and garden due to its lightweight and strong durability. These flexi tub with super strong comfortable handles is lightweight, flexible and tough. It is ideal for use on building sites, farms, stables and around the home and garden. What is a Flexi Tub? A Flexi Tub is a strong, flexible, multi-purpose storage tub made from durable plastic. It usually comes with two side handles for easy carrying. What can I use a Flexi Tub for? Flexi Tubs are highly versatile — they can be used for gardening, laundry, toy storage, pet supplies, carrying water, DIY tasks, or general household storage. Is the tub durable? Yes, Flexi Tubs are made from heavy-duty yet flexible plastic that is resistant to cracks, making them suitable for indoor and outdoor use. Are they easy to carry? Yes, they have built-in flexible handles, making them comfortable to carry even when full. Do they come in different sizes? Yes, Flexi Tubs are available in multiple sizes, from small (around 7L) to large (42L or more), to suit different needs.
